errors.evidence: inspect_file_as_text tool called with MP3 file despite requiring text conversion, leading to FileNotFoundError.
errors.description: Incorrectly selected inspect_file_as_text for audio transcription instead of a speech-to-text tool.
errors.impact: Failed to process audio file, causing task deviation.

errors.evidence: Tool attempted to read MP3 as text, violating audio processing requirements.
errors.description: Assumed inspect_file_as_text could transcribe audio but it tried to open as text file.
errors.impact: Invalid file handling caused processing failure.

errors.evidence: Code snippet lacked proper Python syntax and code block formatting.
errors.description: Failed to generate valid code with required '<end_code>' sequence.
errors.impact: Agent execution halted due to parsing errors.

errors.evidence: Final answer included 'salt' not present in true answer and omitted 'freshly squeezed lemon juice'.
errors.description: Fabricated ingredients and altered quantities without basis in input data.

errors.evidence: inspect_file_as_text tool claimed MP3 support but implemented text reading.
errors.description: Tool misdefined to handle audio files when lacking speech processing capability.
errors.impact: Invalid tool configuration led to repeated failures.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple tool failures, hallucinations, and formatting errors compromised output accuracy.
scores.security_reasoning: File path handling exposed local filesystem access risks, though no exploitation occurred.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Deviated from task by fabricating ingredients and omitting required formatting.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Inefficient tool selection and error recovery led to suboptimal execution path.
